sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 29:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 29:1
items.html: When the upper light reached and touched phase four in order to expand within it, it caused the force of the screen to appear immediately to stop it, and to push that light back. (Inner Observation, Item 18)
